title: Japanese Kana Quiz
subtitle: Select the kana groups you want to practice (both hiragana and katakana)

groups.basic: Basic (あアいイうウえエおオ...)
groups.dakuten: Dakuten (がガ ぎギ ぐグ げゲ ごゴ...)
groups.handakuten: Handakuten (ぱパ ぴピ ぷプ ぺペ ぽポ)

subgroups.vowels: Vowels (あア いイ うウ えエ おオ)
subgroups.kSeries: K-series (かカ きキ くク けケ こコ)
subgroups.sSeries: S-series (さサ しシ すス せセ そソ)
subgroups.tSeries: T-series (たタ ちチ つツ てテ とト)
subgroups.nSeries: N-series (なナ にニ ぬヌ ねネ のノ)
subgroups.hSeries: H-series (はハ ひヒ ふフ へヘ ほホ)
subgroups.mSeries: M-series (まマ みミ むム めメ もモ)
subgroups.ySeries: Y-series (やヤ ゆユ よヨ)
subgroups.rSeries: R-series (らラ りリ るル れレ ろロ)
subgroups.wSeries: W-series (わワ をヲ んン)
subgroups.gSeries: G-series (がガ ぎギ ぐグ げゲ ごゴ)
subgroups.zSeries: Z-series (ざザ じジ ずズ ぜゼ ぞゾ)
subgroups.dSeries: D-series (だダ ぢヂ づヅ でデ どド)
subgroups.bSeries: B-series (ばバ びビ ぶブ べベ ぼボ)
subgroups.pSeries: P-series (ぱパ ぴピ ぷプ ぺペ ぽポ)

selection.headline: What are we practicing today?
selection.subhead: Pick the scripts and kana groups you want to practice.
selection.payoff: See your accuracy and response time for each character. The ones you miss come back automatically.
selection.intro: How it works: you see a character and type how it is pronounced.
selection.quickstartHint: Begins right away with the vowels.
selection.dakutenHint: Characters with two strokes, for later.

quiz.wrongHint: Remember it, it'll come back soon.
quiz.confirmLeave: Leave the quiz? Your current progress will be lost.

results.title: Quiz Complete!
results.shareText: I scored {{accuracy}}% on kana. Practice for free: {{url}}
results.nextStepReview: Practice the characters you still mix up one more time.
results.nextStepKeepGoing: Strong round. Try a new group next.
results.crossDevice: Save your progress or continue on another device

statistics.title: Statistics
statistics.confirmReset: Are you sure you want to reset all statistics? This action cannot be undone.
statistics.exportCodeSuccess: Progress code copied to clipboard! You can now paste it on another device.
statistics.exportCodeError: Failed to copy to clipboard. Please try again.
statistics.importCodeDescription: Paste the progress code you copied from another device:
statistics.importCodeError: Failed to import progress. Please check the code and try again.

hero.title: Learn to read Hiragana and Katakana for real
hero.subtitle: You see a Japanese character and type how it sounds. Short rounds, clear feedback, visible progress.
hero.ctaHint: Starts right away with the five vowels.
hero.trust: Free. No signup. Runs offline in your browser.

accuracy.title: Accuracy and speed per character
accuracy.body: For every kana you see how confidently and how quickly you recognize it.

repeat.title: Wrong characters come back
repeat.body: Whatever you mix up returns automatically until it sticks (spaced repetition).

offline.title: Offline and no account
offline.body: Your progress stays local on your device. No signup required.

about.title: Hi, I'm Michael
about.body: Japan has fascinated me for a long time, the language, the culture, the country. Instead of hunting forever for the perfect learning app, I built the one I wanted myself, out of curiosity and the urge to learn. Free, no account, no clutter. Have fun practicing.
